messages.content:
Make me an html game where I can play snake. I need to control the snake with my keyboard, w,a,s,d and up, down, left, right, as well as [enter] to start the game.
Just like the clasic game, when I touch the target piece, it will disapear and re appear in an available space, and the snake will get one piece longer
please slow down the snake by 80% and make it so that if the stage wraps, so the snake will appear on the other side of the stage, and make sure hitting its own body will result in a game over
